message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync from v0.1.0 to v0.2.0 and remove git patch override

Updates asupersync version from 0.1.0 to 0.2.0 in both [dependencies]
and [dev-dependencies] sections. Also removes the [patch.crates-io]
section that was temporarily pinning asupersync to a specific git revision
(673cf66) for macOS/Windows cross-platform fixes — those fixes are now
included in the published v0.2.0 release, making the patch unnecessary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
